meta.description: West Bengal Assembly Election 2026 — 294 constituency results

seats.name: Dinhata
seats.note: Senior TMC minister Udayan Guha defeated

seats.name: Singur
seats.note: Becharam Manna (TMC's Singur movement face) loses by 21,438 votes

seats.name: Bhabanipur
seats.note: CM Mamata Banerjee loses home seat by 15,105 votes

seats.name: Habra
seats.note: Jyoti Priya Mallick (ex-TMC minister, food scam accused) loses by 1,04,645

seats.name: Baruipur Paschim
seats.note: Assembly Speaker holds seat by 17,862 votes

seats.name: Diamond Harbour
seats.note: Abhishek Banerjee's former constituency stays TMC

seats.name: Sonarpur Dakshin
seats.note: BJP's Rupa Ganguly wins by massive 1,28,970 margin

seats.name: Nandigram
seats.note: BJP holds Suvendu's old seat; 9,665 vote margin over TMC
